hero.title: Hello, I'm Xavier Nouaille
hero.paragraph: Passionate about IT, I learned to code in different languages ​​such as PHP, JavaScript or TypeScript. I am currently a Master MSCPRO student at Epitech Paris and a fullstack developer at DialOnce.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: My projects and desires for the future
paragraphs: Passionate about IT, I learned to code in different languages ​​such as PHP, JavaScript or TypeScript. Versatile, I master the different technical stages of creating a website or a web application; from understanding user needs to developing the final product.
For the realization of my projects, I mainly use the MERN stack (MongoDB, ExpressJS, React, NodeJS). All of my projects are developed with the TypeScript overlay.
As for my background, I started in September 2019, a Bachelor's degree in digital project management. I am currently continuing my apprenticeship in Master MSCPro at Epitech Paris.
After obtaining my Master's degree, my ambition is to go to the United States to improve my level in English and perhaps discover and learn new ways of working.

items.title: FullStack developer
description: Development of micro-services used within the company
Front-end development with ReactJS & NextJS, back-end with NodeJS, Koa. GraphQL & REST APIs. MongoDB NoSQL database
Migrating services to a mono-repo structure
Collaboration with a team of 5 to 10 developers.

items.title: Master MSC PRO in work-study program
FullStack developer
description: Development of a coworking platform with NextJS - NestJS GraphQL technologies
Implementation of the blog with the headless CMS Contentful
Answers to SEO issues with server-side rendering
Remote work in collaboration with the lead tech

description: Containerization applications with Docker. Training on Linux commands.

items.title: ktr-msc-ls1 - Admission test Epitech MSC Pro
React, TypeScript & TailwindCSS Generator
items.description: A script that allows to quickly create a React project with TypeScript & TailwindCSS embedded directly. No need to follow the Tailwind doc anymore.

contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.paragraph: A project, a question? Do not hesitate to contact me, I will let you know my answer as soon as possible.
